top_signals.title: Iranian Strike On Kuwait Airport Raises Stakes For Gulf States
top_signals.summary: Iranian drones and missiles struck Kuwait International Airport overnight, hitting Terminal One, killing at least one person, injuring several others, and causing what Kuwaiti authorities described as significant material damage. Kuwait immediately suspended air traffic, activated emergency procedures, and diverted flights to alternative airports.  In what is being viewed as one of the most direct Iranian strikes against Gulf civilian infrastructure since the conflict began, Iran’s Revolutionary Guard said the operation was retaliation…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Frank Elderson: Strengthening operational resilience for the age of AI

top_signals.title: LR, Samsung Heavy and Capital Partner on Floating Data Center Design
top_signals.summary: Lloyd's Register (LR), Samsung Heavy Industries (SHI) and Capital Clean Energy Carriers Corp have signed a joint development project agreement to advance the design of a floating data center, a concept aimed at addressing growing demand for…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Pulte appointment as spy chief would give a Trump attack dog access to an ocean of intelligence
top_signals.summary: In his role atop the housing finance agency, Bill Pulte has used his access to mortgage records to refer some top Trump opponents for prosecution.
